channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Pakistan-administered Kashmir returns to daily life after deadly protests
item.description: Shops reopened and public transport services partially resumed in Pakistan-administered Kashmir after weeks of protests.

item.title: Nerves and tears as Germany exits World Cup on penalties
item.description: Germany fans watched from Berlin’s Sony Centre as Paraguay stunned the four-time world champion 4-3 on penalties.

item.title: Trump tells US petrol retailers to reduce prices ‘immediately’
item.description: US president warns of 'big problems' if retailers do not cut prices at the pumps, condemns illegal gouging.

item.title: Morocco reach World Cup last-16 with dramatic shootout win over Netherlands
item.description: Morocco came from behind to knock the Netherlands out in the round of 32, beating them 3-2 on penalties.

item.title: How Germany were handed a World Cup humbling and what it means to Paraguay
item.description: As well as Gill's heroics, Paraguay's unlikely victory was founded on coach Alfaro's unshakeable faith in his defenders.

item.title: US education faces ‘a crisis for low-wealth students’
item.description: Andre Perry tells This is America that going to college still pays, but low-wealth students carry most of the debt.

item.title: Police hunt for suspect after three wounded in Monaco blast
item.description: Ukrainian oligarch reported to be among injured in explosion at residential building in the Mediterranean principality.

item.title: Mourners light candles after deadly German shelter shooting
item.description: Residents lit candles on Monday evening near the site of a shooting that killed six staff members at a German shelter.

item.title: Trump: US envoys enroute to Doha for ‘perhaps important’ Iran meeting
item.description: President Donald Trump said US negotiators are heading to Qatar for what he called a ‘perhaps important’ meeting.

item.title: UN ordering 10,000 body bags for Venezuela as death toll expected to rise
item.description: The UN says it is procuring 10,000 body bags for Venezuela, warning the death toll will rise.

item.title: Fears for people deported from US to Venezuela hours before earthquakes hit
item.description: Search for deportees from US continues in the rubble of the hotel they were taken to in Venezuela's La Guaira city.

item.title: Fear grows in Johannesburg market as anti-migrant ‘deadline’ looms
item.description: An unofficial June 30 deadline was set by anti-immigration groups for undocumented migrants to leave South Africa.

item.title: Paraguay coach salutes ‘extraordinary’ World Cup win over Germany
item.description: Paraguay produced arguably the greatest World Cup upset as Germany was defeated 4-3 on penalties in the last 32.

item.title: Families hold out hope for survivors five days after Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: Search and rescue operations continue in Caracas, Venezuela nearly five days after the devastating double earthquakes.

item.title: Keiko Fujimori leads in Peruvian presidential race as vote count concludes
item.description: Daughter of former President Alberto Fujimori says the country is closer to 'order and hope' after prolonged vote count.

item.title: Migrants in South Africa fear violence ahead of June 30 deadline
item.description: An anti-immigrant June 30 deadline not recognised by authorities is fuelling fear among migrants.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran denies Trump’s claim of meeting in Doha
item.description: Trump says meeting with Iran will take place in Doha today, but Tehran says there are no plans for talks in coming days.

item.title: Sixty-six years on: The promise of DRC independence remains unfulfilled
item.description: The DRC’s independence anniversary renews debate over progress, security and state capacity.

item.title: Anxiety turns to joy as Brazil qualifies for the Final 16
item.description: Brazil fans at a fan fest on Rio de Janeiro celebrated after their team overturned Japan’s early lead and won 2-1.

item.title: Israeli strike kills two, setting tents ablaze in Gaza humanitarian zone
item.description: Two people were killed and several others were injured after an Israeli strike hit the Mawasi area of Khan Younis, Gaza.

item.title: Paraguay shock Germany in shootout win for one of all-time World Cup upsets
item.description: Germany lose on penalties to Paraguay after a 1-1 draw in their FIFA World Cup 2026 last-32 match.

item.title: Australian football legend Sam Kerr signs with Gotham FC after Chelsea exit
item.description: Kerr signs with the NWSL champions until 2030, returning to the US league after six years spent with Chelsea in England.

item.title: Sinner and Sabalenka answer doubters on Wimbledon Day one
item.description: Naomi Osaka impresses with her outfit and performance, while British hopes are dashed on first day of championship.

item.title: Netherlands vs Morocco LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow the updates, with live build-up, team news coverage, and our text commentary stream of the last-32 match.

item.title: Marco Rubio meets Libyan commander as US pushes to resolve Libya crisis
item.description: The US top diplomat commends Libyan leaders' efforts to 'overcome divisions' after talks with LNA's Saddam Haftar.
